1866070.name: Limited Unleashed
1866070.description:
Limited Unleashed is an independently developed, community funded initiative with the mission to recuperate as many popular releases as possible from the secondary markets to drop them in a free-to-play virtual experience.

After creating your ideal character using the character customization menu which features popular styles and accessories, the player is dropped into an open field, outside of a massive cylindrical impenetrable red wall with up to 100 other players. At the time of the drop, the wall disintegrates, and the release is dropped from the sky. Race as fast as you can while managing your Stamina as you Sprint and Dash your way to be the first to reach the releasing drop first.

But, the work's not done once you've obtained the release! With the drop in hand, the wall becomes visible again, but blue, and the character generates a pulse that knocks nearby players to the ground; return to the outer boundary of the wall without being intercepted by another dashing player to take home the WIN. Other players can still dash into you for the interception, knocking you to the ground, and stealing the drop, so watch your back and stay on the move!

Limited Unleashed is currently in Early Access, where limited sessions will be hosted at defined times on a regular basis, and game features and mechanics have willingly been kept at a minimum. We invite the community to participate in the development and expansion of features by joining in discussion, providing suggestions, voting and taking part in polls through our various channels.
